description: This Kotlin file defines a singleton object 'BiometricAuth' that provides methods for biometric authentication using the AndroidX Biometric library. It includes functions to check if biometric authentication is available and to perform the authentication process with callback handlers for success and error scenarios.

classes.name: BiometricAuth
classes.description: A singleton object providing biometric authentication utilities including availability check and user authentication.

methods.name: canAuthenticate
methods.description: Checks whether the device supports biometric authentication with strong biometrics or device credentials.

methods.name: authenticate
methods.description: Performs biometric authentication with customizable title and subtitle, invoking success or error callbacks based on the result.
